name: Barley Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the last three in a 3-quart pot.
2. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 15 minutes until barley is tender.
3. Mix flour into 1/2 cup milk and add to the soup.
4. Add the remaining milk and cook for about five minutes until thickened.
5. Remove from heat and stir in cheese.
6. Cover and let stand for 3-5 minutes.
